label: AWS Bedrock
description: Send a prompt through AWS Bedrock via the platform's OpenAI-compatible chat-completion endpoint (provider:'bedrock').

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model / deployment
settings.description: Leave blank to use the AWS_BEDROCK_CHAT_MODEL env default. No literal model strings — env or platform decides.

ai.whenToUse: When the user explicitly wants Bedrock-routed inference (Claude/Llama/Titan via AWS).
ai.examplePrompt: summarize via Bedrock and return JSON
ai.promptHints: Reference the response with {{steps.<id>.content}}. Leave model blank so the platform picks the configured deployment.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Bedrock returned an empty completion — usually a provider/model issue or content-filter rejection.
